pre_mission.speaker: Sera
pre_mission.line: If you are here to prey on the helpless, line up and die in order.

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: We are here to get them out.

pre_mission.speaker: Sera
pre_mission.line: Then stand and hold this line with me.

battle_start.speaker: Sera
battle_start.line: Hold the corridor. No one passes us.

battle_start.speaker: Aric
battle_start.line: Move the wounded behind our line.

post_mission.speaker: Sera
post_mission.line: You chose the trapped before the pursuit. That is not how most officers think.

post_mission.speaker: Sera
post_mission.line: I will accompany you. For now.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: For now is all we need.
